title: Graphify Pre-Query Output
description: Step 1.5 output from graphify-query.py. Contains structural_context extracted from the global Graphify cache before BA analysis. Status field drives BA behaviour: ok/degraded proceed, unavailable/skipped silently bypass.

status.description: ok=cache hit with full data; degraded=partial parse; unavailable=binary/cache absent; skipped=explicitly disabled

task_id.description: Dev session task ID that generated this pre-query

structural_context.description: Extracted structural context (800-1500 tokens, 2000 hard cap). Empty object when status=unavailable/skipped.

candidate_anchors.description: Resolved file/module references found in the user requirement

import_graph_excerpt.description: Key import/dependency edges relevant to mentioned files

high_centrality_nodes.description: Files with high betweenness centrality that are likely affected

token_count.description: Approximate token count of structural_context content

truncated.description: true if context was truncated to stay under 2000-token hard cap

ambiguity_hypotheses.description: Populated when implicit reference words detected (之前/已有/现有/原来的/previous/existing/original). Each entry represents a candidate interpretation.

extraction_layers_used.description: Which of the 3 extraction layers successfully contributed data

error_detail.description: Present when status=degraded; describes partial failure
